articles.summary_original: Copper fell from its highest close since early February, as ceasefire talks between Washington and Tehran were thrown into uncertainty after the US seized an Iranian ship in the Strait of Hormuz.

articles.summary_original: China’s cheap artificial intelligence models are rapidly attracting global users and creating new winners in the nation’s stock market.

articles.summary: 多家中央主流媒体推出“新思想引领新征程”相关报道，聚焦习近平总书记引领我国网络强国建设进程，强调要持续筑牢网络强国建设基石，推动互联网更好造福人民与世界，便利群众生产生活，赋能我国经济社会高质量发展。

articles.summary_original: A high-profile Chinese coal-to-gas venture that lay dormant for over a decade is set to launch this year, part of a wave of investments that will allow Beijing to mitigate threats to fuel supply at a time of heightened geopolitical tensions.

articles.title: 摩根大通称市场认为中东冲突将走向缓和
articles.title_original: Markets Seeing Off-Ramp in Middle East Conflict, JPMorgan Says
articles.summary: 摩根大通资产管理的克里·克雷格接受彭博电视台采访时表示，当前市场在一定程度上处于震荡盘整状态，投资者普遍认为中东冲突正迎来缓和。随着美国财报季开启，市场焦点正逐步转向微观基本面，相关消息源自彭博。
articles.summary_original: Kerry Craig of JPMorgan Asset Management says the markets are "moving in circles to a certain degree" but investors are seeing developments in the Middle East as "pointing towards an off-ramp in the conflict." He tells Bloomberg Television that the focus is increasingly shifting to micro fundamentals given the start of earnings season in the US. (Source: Bloomberg)
